tasks.subject: Task 1: Write ADR-9 (tax-aware categorisation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Self-contained decision record explaining why categories carry deduction flags from V1.

**Files:**
- Create: `Docs/adr/009-tax-aware-categorisation.md`

**Verify:** `Test-Path Docs/adr/009-tax-aware-categorisation.md` returns True; Status/Context/Decision/Consequences headings all present.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Docs/adr/009-tax-aware-categorisation.md"],"verifyCommand":"Test-Path Docs/adr/009-tax-aware-categorisation.md","acceptanceCriteria":["file exists","four required headings","Status is Accepted","references ADR-1 and ADR-4","lists schema columns: is_deductible_candidate, deduction_kind, receipt_object_key, receipt_uploaded_at","names AU seed taxonomy buckets"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write ADR-10 (cashflow forecasting)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Decision record explaining why Conto projects forward, not just reports past.

**Files:**
- Create: `Docs/adr/010-cashflow-forecasting.md`

**Verify:** `Test-Path Docs/adr/010-cashflow-forecasting.md` returns True; four headings present.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Docs/adr/010-cashflow-forecasting.md"],"verifyCommand":"Test-Path Docs/adr/010-cashflow-forecasting.md","acceptanceCriteria":["file exists","four required headings","Status is Accepted","references ADR-4 and ADR-5","states 30/60/90 horizon","names Phase 2.5 position"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Write ADR-11 (expected events first-class)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Decision record explaining choice of materialised expected_events table over computed-on-demand.

**Files:**
- Create: `Docs/adr/011-expected-events-first-class.md`

**Verify:** `Test-Path Docs/adr/011-expected-events-first-class.md` returns True; four headings present.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Docs/adr/011-expected-events-first-class.md"],"verifyCommand":"Test-Path Docs/adr/011-expected-events-first-class.md","acceptanceCriteria":["file exists","four required headings","Status is Accepted","states alternative considered and why rejected","names source values including future tax_obligation","states re-materialisation contract","references ADR-1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update Docs/PLAN.md (ADRs §2, schema §4, phases §8, open questions §11, changelog)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring planning document up to date with the three new ADRs and their schema/phase implications.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Docs/PLAN.md` (sections 2, 4, 8, 11, and changelog)

**Verify:** Select-String for ADR-9, ADR-10, ADR-11, Phase 2.5, recurrence_groups, expected_events, pay_cadences, cashflow_buffer_cents, v0.2 (2026-05-04) all return at least 1 match.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Docs/PLAN.md"],"verifyCommand":"Select-String -Path Docs/PLAN.md -Pattern 'ADR-9','ADR-10','ADR-11','Phase 2.5','recurrence_groups','expected_events','pay_cadences','cashflow_buffer_cents'","acceptanceCriteria":["§2 lists ADR-9/10/11 as one-liners","§4 contains new schema for recurrence_groups, pay_cadences, expected_events","§4 alters categories, transactions, users, payslips","§8 inserts Phase 2.5 between Phase 2 and 3","§8 renames Phase 3 to classification & subscription polish","§8 lists tax features in Phases 3, 4, 5, 6","§11 records resolved/deferred items","changelog has v0.2 (2026-05-04) entry"]}
```
